name: Petite Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Line a 32-muffin muffin tin with foil baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, eggs, sugar, lemon rind, and vanilla extract in an electric mixer. Blend well.
4. Place one vanilla wafer in each muffin cup.
5. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the cheese mixture on top of the vanilla wafers.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Cool slightly.
8. To serve, top each cheesecake with a tablespoon of cherry pie filling.
Notes: Keep refrigerated. Freezes well without the pie filling. Substitute any other filling as desired.
